dataset_evidence_classification.allowed_use: core in-domain ablation and main-table evidence where held-out Stage12 aggregates support the row
dataset_evidence_classification.blocked_use: external generalization or global robustness claims

dataset_evidence_classification.allowed_use: external/supporting PeMS discussion only until tracked ten-split Stage12 evidence exists
dataset_evidence_classification.blocked_use: core claim support or EVID-03 completion from Stage11, DRY_RUN, or one-seed feasibility artifacts
dataset_evidence_classification.required_upgrade: tracked Stage12 baseline portfolio with exactly ten splits and reviewer-facing aggregate artifacts

dataset_evidence_classification.allowed_use: external/transfer-style support only after complete tracked ten-split Stage12 evidence
dataset_evidence_classification.blocked_use: core claims while external_evidence_gate or stage12_status.json reports incomplete evidence
dataset_evidence_classification.required_upgrade: completed tracked Seattle Stage12 ten-split aggregate artifacts and completed stage12_status.json

dataset_evidence_classification.allowed_use: appendix or bounded stress-test evidence for tested perturbations
dataset_evidence_classification.blocked_use: global robustness claims or core dataset elevation without multi-seed perturbation evidence
dataset_evidence_classification.blocker_reason: robustness evidence remains stress-test or appendix-only unless multi-seed perturbation evidence is added
dataset_evidence_classification.required_upgrade: multi-seed perturbation evidence before any stronger robustness claim route

metadata.generated_at_utc_note: fixed deterministic timestamp; regenerate command provenance is captured by git commit/status

policy.raw_dataset_disposition: protected local input only; never listed as evidence artifact
policy.seattle_core_policy: blocked from core until external gate and status artifacts report complete tracked ten-split Stage12 evidence
policy.validation_mae_disposition: selection evidence only; never marked as held-out test evidence
